data.body: Investigated: all blocking bugs (275d-dfd5, 0cd6-57d6, 6286-cb8e) are closed. Outbound sync verified, inbound TZ fix verified, INBOUND_TYPE_MAPPING configured. Remaining before close: (1) full field-edit round-trip verification (create ticket in repo → verify all fields in Jira, edit each field → verify in Jira, create in Jira → verify in repo, edit in Jira → verify in repo); (2) inbound checkpoint rewind to 2026-04-16T16:13:00Z to re-fetch 7+ days of missed syncs (per 0e38-a5da). These require live Jira bridge access. Leaving OPEN for user to complete manual verification.
